calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Steve Naumchik, Esq. for Plaintiff: T & S Realty and CAL American.
Defendant: Jamil Tawasha present in pro per, no appearance by the Co-Defendants: Najla Tawasha and Jamal Tawasha.
Plaintiffs and Defendants: Jamil Tawasha and Jamal Tawassha has entered into a stipulated for entry of Judgment, and prove-up as to non appearing Co-Defendant: Najla Tawasha.
Plaintiff's witness: Michelle Tamayo, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Rental agreement dtd. 5-29-04---------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Three day notice dtd. 10-10-04---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant: Najla Tawasha as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 555 John Muir Dr., #B203, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $2,970.00
Attorney's Fees $900.00
Costs $203.30, for a total of $4,073.30
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ALAN HORWITZ FOR PLAINTIFF T&S REALTY
DEFENDANT JAMIL TAWASHA IN PRO PER.
NON APPEARANCE BY NAILA TAWASHA AND JAMAL TAWASHA

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR AS TO NAILA TAWASHA AND JAMAL TAWASHA, AND JURY DEMAND
STRICKEN AS TO NAILA TAWASHA AND JAMAL TAWASHA ONLY.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD AS TO JAMIL TAWASHA ONLY. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT AUNE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
